mapper.select: SELECT VENUE_ID, VENUE_NM, LOCATION, TOTAL_SEATS, SEAT_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_USER, REG_DT FROM VENUE WHERE VENUE_ID = #{venueId}

SELECT VENUE_ID, VENUE_NM, LOCATION, TOTAL_SEATS, SEAT_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_USER, REG_DT FROM VENUE WHERE 1=1
AND VENUE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND VENUE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY VENUE_ID ASC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM VENUE WHERE 1=1
AND VENUE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND VENUE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
